base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of pause_font_x_counter — a ui (menu_screen) from 1986 legend of zelda. Pause-counter font — 'X' prefix + 0-9 digits + 'A' 'B' — 13 glyphs used in pause-screen counters ('X12' rupees etc). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Pause-counter font — 'X' prefix + 0-9 digits + 'A' 'B' — 13 glyphs used in pause-screen counters ('X12' rupees etc)
